name: Chrome Dino Maps Tourist Accessory Pack
description: Meet the ultimate adventure enthusiast! Chrome Dino is determined to see the world. Wearing a cap and trusty camera, this T-rex is trying to find a special spot on this map. Do you know where they're headed?
details: Accessories only, Chrome Dino sold separately
Accessory pack includes: Hat, camera and secret map
Small parts, not intended for children under 14

name: Android a-MAZE-ing Collectible
description: Navigate the maze inside this limited-edition Android collectible figure. A must-have for Android fans and puzzle lovers alike. Can you guide the ball through the maze?
details: Features a working ball maze inside

name: Chrome Dino Bandana
description: Show your love for the classic Chrome Dino with this stylish paisley bandana. Great for pets, people, and everything in between. Features an all-over Chrome Dino paisley print.
details: Versatile — wear as a headband, neck scarf, or pet bandana

name: Google Bike Bandana
description: A sleek Google Bike-themed bandana in deep navy. Wear it around your neck, head, or wrist for an on-trend Google look. Features a subtle Google Bike pattern throughout.
details: Google Bike pattern in deep navy

name: Doogler Reversible Red Bandana
description: Two looks in one! This reversible Doogler bandana features a bold red Google-branded side and a fun Doogler pattern on the other. Perfect for dogs and their humans.
details: Reversible design — two bandanas in one
One side features Google branding, other side has Doogler print
Great for pets and people alike

name: Android Pint-sized Keychain
description: Carry a tiny Android friend wherever you go! This adorable pint-sized Android keychain is the perfect addition to your keys or bag. A great gift for any Android fan.

name: YouTube Plush Keychain
description: Fluffy, fun, and ready to play! This YouTube plush keychain features the iconic YouTube logo in a soft, squeezable form. Clip it to your bag or keys for a pop of color.

name: Chrome Dino Utensil Set
description: Eat like a Dino! This Chrome Dino utensil set includes a fork, knife, and spoon in a fun dino-themed carrying case. Eco-friendly and reusable — perfect for on-the-go meals.
details: Set includes fork, knife, and spoon
Comes with a Chrome Dino-themed carrying case

name: Chrome Dino rPET Wristlet
description: A compact and eco-friendly wristlet made from recycled PET materials, featuring the beloved Chrome Dino. Perfect for carrying essentials on your next adventure.

name: Google Inkwell Straw Tumbler
description: Stay hydrated in style with the Google Inkwell Straw Tumbler. Features double-wall insulation, a reusable straw, and the iconic Google logo. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours.
details: Keeps drinks cold up to 24 hours

name: Google Bike Eco Canvas Duffel
description: A spacious eco-friendly canvas duffel bag featuring the Google Bike design. Made from sustainable materials — great for the gym, travel, or daily adventures.

name: Google Driftwood 1/4 Zip
description: Layer up in comfort with the Google Driftwood 1/4 Zip. Crafted from a soft fleece blend with a subtle Google logo embroidery on the chest. Perfect for cool days.

name: Google Driftwood Women's 1/4 Zip
description: A women's-cut version of the beloved Driftwood 1/4 Zip. Cozy fleece fabric with a tailored fit and Google logo embroidery. Stay warm and stylish.

name: Google Kyoto Tee
description: Inspired by the beauty of Kyoto, this unisex tee features a unique Google-branded graphic print. Soft cotton, relaxed fit — perfect for everyday wear.

name: Google Kyoto Women's Tee
description: A women's-fit version of the Kyoto Tee with a beautiful Kyoto-inspired Google graphic. Lightweight cotton with a flattering silhouette for everyday style.

name: Google Kyoto Sweatshirt
description: Stay cozy with the Google Kyoto Sweatshirt. Features a premium fleece interior, ribbed cuffs, and the iconic Kyoto-inspired Google graphic on the chest.
